transcript: Speaker A: मला काल रात्री नीट झोप लागली नाही. [I didn't sleep well last night.] Speaker B: I did not sleep well last night. Speaker A: मी वारंवार उठत होते. [I kept waking up again and again.] Speaker B: I kept waking up again and again. Speaker A: माझं मन शांत नव्हतं. [My mind was not calm.] Speaker B: My mind was not calm. Speaker A: आज मला खूप थकवा जाणवतो आहे. [I feel very tired today.] Speaker B: I feel very tired today. Speaker A: मला लक्ष केंद्रित करता येत नाहीये. [I am not able to focus.] Speaker B: I am not able to focus. Speaker A: आज सगळंच हळूहळू चालल्यासारखं वाटतंय. [Everything feels slow today.] Speaker B: Everything feels slow today. Speaker A: विनाकारण चिडचिड होत आहे. [I am feeling irritated for no reason.] Speaker B: I am feeling irritated for no reason. Speaker A: अगदी छोटी कामंसुद्धा कठीण वाटत आहेत. [Even small tasks feel difficult.] Speaker B: Even small tasks feel difficult. Speaker A: काश, काल नीट झोप झाली असती. [I wish I had slept better.] Speaker B: I wish I had slept better. Speaker A: आजचा दिवस नेहमीपेक्षा जास्त लांब वाटतोय. [Today feels longer than usual.] Speaker B: Today feels longer than usual. Speaker A: प्रत्येक वाक्याचं तू इंग्लिश मध्ये लगेच उत्तर दिलंस. कुठून शिकलास? [You answered every sentence in English immediately. Where did you learn?] Speaker B: मी रोज पंधरा मिनिटं एआय सोबत बोललो आणि तिथूनच शिकलो. [I spoke with AI for 15 minutes daily and learned from there.] Speaker A: कसं? आणि कोणतं एआय? [How? And which AI?] Speaker B: MySivi AI. यात एआय सोबत बोलताना ती तुला इंग्लिश बोलायला लावते आणि चूक झाली तर लगेच करेक्ट करते. [MySivi AI. While talking to this AI, it makes you speak English and corrects you immediately if you make a mistake.] Speaker A: आणि पैसे किती? [And how much does it cost?] Speaker B: फक्त एक रुपयात सुरू करू शकतेस. [You can start for just one rupee.] Speaker A: ट्राय करते MySivi App. [I will try MySivi App.]

summary: The ad features a split-screen conversation where a woman speaks in Marathi and a man instantly translates her sentences into English. He explains that he practices daily with MySivi AI, which corrects mistakes in real-time. The ad promotes the MySivi App, highlighting that users can start practicing for just 1 rupee.
